---
title: "02. 全等、刚性与初等平面构形"
subtitle: "Congruence, Rigidity, and Elementary Plane Configurations"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 2
categories: [elements, cultural, omega]
description: "How congruence, circles, and inscribed configurations show that sparse compatible relations force geometry."
---

**Books:** Book I, III, IV  
**Omega Directions:** `spectral theory`, `fold operator`, `dynamical systems`

{{< include articles/category_02_congruence_rigidity_and_elementary_plane_configurations.md >}}

---

[Back to Elements Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
